name: brazilian-sectoral-regulations-mcp
description: Brazilian sectoral regulations MCP — ANATEL, ANS, ANVISA, ANEEL, and ANAC cybersecurity and compliance requirements

tools.name: search_regulations
tools.description: Full-text search across all Brazilian sectoral regulations

tools.name: get_provision
tools.description: Retrieve a single provision from a specific regulation

tools.name: get_cybersecurity_requirements
tools.description: Get cybersecurity requirements for a Brazilian sector

tools.name: get_certification_requirements
tools.description: Get certification and approval requirements for a sector

tools.name: get_regulator_info
tools.description: Get information about a Brazilian sectoral regulatory authority

tools.name: check_applicability
tools.description: Determine whether sectoral regulations apply to a business activity

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List data sources with record counts and freshness

tools.name: check_data_freshness
tools.description: Check data freshness and identify stale sources
